mapper.select: SELECT HOSPITAL_ID AS hospitalId, OWNER_ID AS ownerId, NAME AS name, PHONE AS phone, STATUS AS status, OPEN_TIME AS openTime, CLOSE_TIME AS closeTime, BREAK_TIME AS lunchTime, CLOSED_DAYS AS holiday FROM HOSPITAL WHERE OWNER_ID = #{ownerId} ORDER BY HOSPITAL_ID DESC

SELECT HOSPITAL_ID AS hospitalId, OWNER_ID AS ownerId,
NAME AS name, ADDRESS AS address, DETAIL_ADDRESS AS detailAddress, PHONE AS phone, DISTRICT AS district,
LATITUDE AS latitude, LONGITUDE AS longitude,
OPEN_TIME AS openTime, CLOSE_TIME AS closeTime, BREAK_TIME AS lunchTime, CLOSED_DAYS AS holiday,
STATUS AS status,
DESCRIPTION AS description, IMAGE_URL AS imageUrl, WEBSITE_URL AS websiteUrl,
MEDICAL_SUBJECTS AS medicalSubjects, DOCTOR_INFO AS doctorInfo, NOTE AS note,
CREATED_AT AS createdAt, UPDATED_AT AS updatedAt
FROM HOSPITAL WHERE HOSPITAL_ID = #{hospitalId}

SELECT HOSPITAL_ID AS hospitalId, OWNER_ID AS ownerId,
NAME AS name, ADDRESS AS address, DETAIL_ADDRESS AS detailAddress, PHONE AS phone, DISTRICT AS district,
LATITUDE AS latitude, LONGITUDE AS longitude,
OPEN_TIME AS openTime, CLOSE_TIME AS closeTime, BREAK_TIME AS lunchTime, CLOSED_DAYS AS holiday,
STATUS AS status,
DESCRIPTION AS description, IMAGE_URL AS imageUrl, WEBSITE_URL AS websiteUrl,
MEDICAL_SUBJECTS AS medicalSubjects, DOCTOR_INFO AS doctorInfo, NOTE AS note,
CREATED_AT AS createdAt, UPDATED_AT AS updatedAt
FROM HOSPITAL WHERE HOSPITAL_ID = #{hospitalId} AND OWNER_ID = #{ownerId}
SELECT ANIMAL_ID FROM HOSPITAL_ANIMAL WHERE HOSPITAL_ID = #{hospitalId} ORDER BY ANIMAL_ID
SELECT SERVICE_ID FROM HOSPITAL_SERVICE WHERE HOSPITAL_ID = #{hospitalId} ORDER BY SERVICE_ID
SELECT SUBJECT_ID FROM HOSPITAL_MEDICAL_SUBJECT WHERE HOSPITAL_ID = #{hospitalId} ORDER BY SUBJECT_ID
mapper.update:
UPDATE HOSPITAL SET PHONE = #{hospitalPhone},
OPEN_TIME = #{openTime}, CLOSE_TIME = #{closeTime}, BREAK_TIME = #{breakTime}, CLOSED_DAYS = #{closedDays},
DOCTOR_INFO = #{hospitalDoctorInfo}, DESCRIPTION = #{hospitalDescription}, NOTE = #{hospitalNote},
UPDATED_AT = SYSTIMESTAMP
WHERE HOSPITAL_ID = #{hospitalId} AND OWNER_ID = #{memberId} AND STATUS = 'OPEN'
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO HOSPITAL_UPDATE_REQUEST (
HOSPITAL_ID, MEMBER_ID, REQUEST_TYPE,
APPLICANT_NAME, BUSINESS_NUMBER, DOCUMENT_URL,
HOSPITAL_NAME, HOSPITAL_PHONE,
HOSPITAL_ADDRESS, HOSPITAL_DETAIL_ADDRESS, HOSPITAL_DISTRICT, HOSPITAL_WEBSITE_URL,
HOSPITAL_LATITUDE, HOSPITAL_LONGITUDE,
MEDICAL_SUBJECTS, OPEN_TIME, CLOSE_TIME, BREAK_TIME, CLOSED_DAYS,
HOSPITAL_DOCTOR_INFO, HOSPITAL_DESCRIPTION, HOSPITAL_IMAGE_URL, HOSPITAL_NOTE,
TEMP_CLOSE_START_AT, TEMP_CLOSE_END_AT, REQUEST_REASON,
STATUS, CREATED_AT
) VALUES (
#{hospitalId}, #{memberId}, #{requestType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{applicantName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{businessNumber,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{documentUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{hospitalName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{hospitalPhone,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{hospitalAddress,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{hospitalDetailAddress,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{hospitalDistrict,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{hospitalWebsiteUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{hospitalLatitude,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{hospitalLongitude,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
#{medicalSubjects,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{openTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{closeTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{breakTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{closedDays,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{hospitalDoctorInfo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{hospitalDescription,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{hospitalImageUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{hospitalNote,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{tempCloseStartAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{tempCloseEndAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{requestReason,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
'PENDING', SYSTIMESTAMP
)
mapper.select:
SELECT R.REQUEST_ID AS requestId, R.HOSPITAL_ID AS hospitalId, R.MEMBER_ID AS memberId, R.REQUEST_TYPE AS requestType,
R.APPLICANT_NAME AS applicantName, R.BUSINESS_NUMBER AS businessNumber, R.DOCUMENT_URL AS documentUrl,
R.HOSPITAL_NAME AS hospitalName, R.HOSPITAL_PHONE AS hospitalPhone,
R.HOSPITAL_ADDRESS AS hospitalAddress, R.HOSPITAL_DETAIL_ADDRESS AS hospitalDetailAddress, R.HOSPITAL_DISTRICT AS hospitalDistrict, R.HOSPITAL_WEBSITE_URL AS hospitalWebsiteUrl,
R.HOSPITAL_LATITUDE AS hospitalLatitude, R.HOSPITAL_LONGITUDE AS hospitalLongitude,
R.MEDICAL_SUBJECTS AS medicalSubjects, R.OPEN_TIME AS openTime, R.CLOSE_TIME AS closeTime, R.BREAK_TIME AS breakTime, R.CLOSED_DAYS AS closedDays,
R.HOSPITAL_DOCTOR_INFO AS hospitalDoctorInfo, R.HOSPITAL_DESCRIPTION AS hospitalDescription, R.HOSPITAL_IMAGE_URL AS hospitalImageUrl, R.HOSPITAL_NOTE AS hospitalNote,
R.TEMP_CLOSE_START_AT AS tempCloseStartAt, R.TEMP_CLOSE_END_AT AS tempCloseEndAt, R.REQUEST_REASON AS requestReason,
R.STATUS AS status, R.CREATED_AT AS createdAt, R.PROCESSED_AT AS processedAt, R.PROCESSED_BY AS processedBy, R.REJECT_REASON AS rejectReason,
M.NICKNAME AS memberNickname
FROM HOSPITAL_UPDATE_REQUEST R JOIN APP_MEMBER M ON R.MEMBER_ID = M.MEMBER_ID WHERE R.REQUEST_ID = #{requestId}

SELECT R.REQUEST_ID AS requestId, R.HOSPITAL_ID AS hospitalId, R.MEMBER_ID AS memberId, R.REQUEST_TYPE AS requestType,
R.HOSPITAL_NAME AS hospitalName, R.REQUEST_REASON AS requestReason,
R.STATUS AS status, R.CREATED_AT AS createdAt,
M.NICKNAME AS memberNickname
FROM HOSPITAL_UPDATE_REQUEST R JOIN APP_MEMBER M ON R.MEMBER_ID = M.MEMBER_ID WHERE R.STATUS = 'PENDING' ORDER BY R.CREATED_AT DESC

SELECT REQUEST_ID AS requestId, HOSPITAL_ID AS hospitalId, MEMBER_ID AS memberId, REQUEST_TYPE AS requestType,
HOSPITAL_NAME AS hospitalName, REQUEST_REASON AS requestReason,
TEMP_CLOSE_START_AT AS tempCloseStartAt, TEMP_CLOSE_END_AT AS tempCloseEndAt,
STATUS AS status, CREATED_AT AS createdAt, PROCESSED_AT AS processedAt, REJECT_REASON AS rejectReason
FROM HOSPITAL_UPDATE_REQUEST WHERE HOSPITAL_ID = #{hospitalId} AND MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} ORDER BY CREATED_AT DESC

SELECT REQUEST_ID AS requestId, HOSPITAL_ID AS hospitalId, MEMBER_ID AS memberId, REQUEST_TYPE AS requestType, STATUS AS status, CREATED_AT AS createdAt, REJECT_REASON AS rejectReason
FROM HOSPITAL_UPDATE_REQUEST WHERE HOSPITAL_ID = #{hospitalId} ORDER BY CREATED_AT DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY
mapper.update: UPDATE HOSPITAL_UPDATE_REQUEST SET STATUS = #{status}, PROCESSED_AT = SYSTIMESTAMP, PROCESSED_BY = #{processedBy}, REJECT_REASON = #{rejectReason} WHERE REQUEST_ID = #{requestId} AND STATUS = 'PENDING'
mapper.select: SELECT ANIMAL_ID FROM HOSPITAL_UPDATE_REQUEST_ANIMAL WHERE REQUEST_ID = #{requestId} ORDER BY ANIMAL_ID
SELECT SERVICE_ID FROM HOSPITAL_UPDATE_REQUEST_SERVICE WHERE REQUEST_ID = #{requestId} ORDER BY SERVICE_ID
SELECT SUBJECT_ID FROM HOSPITAL_UPDATE_REQUEST_MEDICAL_SUBJECT WHERE REQUEST_ID = #{requestId} ORDER BY SUBJECT_ID
mapper.update:
UPDATE HOSPITAL SET NAME = #{hospitalName}, PHONE = #{hospitalPhone},
ADDRESS = #{hospitalAddress}, DETAIL_ADDRESS = #{hospitalDetailAddress}, DISTRICT = #{hospitalDistrict}, WEBSITE_URL = #{hospitalWebsiteUrl},
LATITUDE = #{hospitalLatitude}, LONGITUDE = #{hospitalLongitude},
OPEN_TIME = #{openTime}, CLOSE_TIME = #{closeTime}, BREAK_TIME = #{breakTime}, CLOSED_DAYS = #{closedDays},
DOCTOR_INFO = #{hospitalDoctorInfo}, DESCRIPTION = #{hospitalDescription}, IMAGE_URL = #{hospitalImageUrl}, NOTE = #{hospitalNote},
UPDATED_AT = SYSTIMESTAMP
WHERE HOSPITAL_ID = #{hospitalId}

UPDATE HOSPITAL SET MEDICAL_SUBJECTS = ( SELECT LISTAGG(MS.SUBJECT_NAME, ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY MS.SUBJECT_ID) FROM HOSPITAL_MEDICAL_SUBJECT HMS JOIN MEDICAL_SUBJECT MS ON HMS.SUBJECT_ID = MS.SUBJECT_ID WHERE HMS.HOSPITAL_ID = #{hospitalId} ), UPDATED_AT = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE HOSPITAL_ID = #{hospitalId}
UPDATE HOSPITAL SET STATUS = 'CLOSED', NOTE = 'CLOSED_BY_ADMIN', UPDATED_AT = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE HOSPITAL_ID = #{hospitalId} AND STATUS != 'CLOSED'

UPDATE HOSPITAL SET STATUS = 'CLOSED', NOTE = 'DELETE_PENDING', UPDATED_AT = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE OWNER_ID IN ( SELECT MEMBER_ID FROM APP_MEMBER WHERE MEMBER_STATUS = 'DELETED' ) AND (NOTE IS NULL OR NOTE != 'DELETE_PENDING')
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM HOSPITAL WHERE STATUS = 'CLOSED' AND NOTE = 'DELETE_PENDING' AND UPDATED_AT <= SYSTIMESTAMP - INTERVAL '1' HOUR
